description: Generate your brand in-agent, then keep tokens, components, and copy on-brand over MCP.
name: ai.variel/mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: Your Variel project API key (bsk_…) to connect an existing brand. Get it from your Variel dashboard, or run `variel-mcp login` to provision one via browser sign-in (no copy-paste). You can also start keyless and generate a brand with generate_brand_kickoff.
environmentVariables.name: BRAND_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Override the Variel API base URL. Defaults to https://variel.ai. Optional — for self-hosted or staging.
environmentVariables.name: VARIEL_API_URL

environmentVariables.description: Anthropic API key. Required only for grade_visual_quality, generate_component, and Tier-2 validate_copy. Optional for all other tools.
environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY

title: Variel MCP Server
